To: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: Yesterday's governance review — quick recap

Hi R,

Just a quick note on yesterday's session. I thought it went really well! The sponsor said he wanted an honest conversation and everyone was engaged and contributing, which was great to see.

You presented the Federation case clearly and there was good discussion. Tom and Priya raised the idea of a fast-follow, but that felt like normal brainstorming — people thinking out loud about options. Lena asked a sensible question about socialising options with the exec group. Overall the tone was positive and collaborative.

The sponsor said he'd reflect and come back next week, so I think we're in good shape — sounds like he's supportive and just wants a bit of time to think it over before confirming. I'd say we just sit tight and wait for the decision.

I'll circulate the minutes this afternoon. Let me know if you want anything else captured.

PC
